weaknesses: Limited direct finance/accounting experience (1-3 yrs required)
No explicit Salesforce production admin experience
No VBA or advanced Excel macros shown
No PowerPoint examples for stakeholder decks
improvement_bullets: Developed Power BI and Looker workflows to replace manual written reporting, reducing data mismatches and improving work efficiency by 40%, directly supporting the need for efficient CRM data management.

Created statistical models to identify high-value customer segments; targeted marketing initiatives informed by these models contributed to a 300% increase in revenue in the targeted segment over 12 months, demonstrating strong quantitative skills and a passion for providing stakeholders with data to drive success.

Built Python automation for weekly sales and operations reports (ingesting POS and CRM data), eliminating repetitive data entry, saving 8 hours per week, and improving reporting accuracy for faster strategic decisions, showcasing a motivated self-starter approach to improving processes.

Standardized organizational KPIs and data governance frameworks to ensure cross-functional alignment, resulting in a consistent "single source of truth" for all business stakeholders and a reduction in report discrepancies, demonstrating a strong commitment to data accuracy and governance.

Transformed user feedback into production-ready code to address friction points in the UI, driving a 15% increase in feature adoption, which translates to a proactive approach to user support and system improvement.
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to submit my application for the Business Support Analyst opportunity with Intuvia Technologies. I am interested in this opportunity because the role's focus on data management and user support within a leading global investment and corporate bank aligns perfectly with my analytical skills and experience. What interests me about working for Intuvia Technologies is its reputation for [company's approach to something unique - research this if possible, e.g., "innovation in financial technology" or "its commitment to client success"] excites inspires intrigues me because [your connection - e.g., "I am passionate about leveraging technology to enhance financial services and believe Intuvia is at the forefront of this."].

I believe my proficiency in SQL and Python, coupled with my experience in data governance and reporting, would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a focus on data accuracy and efficiency. In fact, at Shine Masters Cleaning Services, I developed Python automation for weekly sales and operations reports, ingesting POS and CRM data. This initiative eliminated repetitive data entry, saved 8 hours per week, and improved reporting accuracy for faster strategic decisions, showcasing my ability to be a motivated self-starter and drive change.

Ultimately, I know that the Business Support Analyst role at Intuvia Technologies would allow me to bring my data governance and stakeholder support skills to managing data in close coordination with bankers, COO Group colleagues, Finance, and IT partners. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my quantitative skills and reporting capabilities. I created statistical models to identify high-value customer segments, and targeted marketing initiatives informed by these models contributed to a 300% increase in revenue in the targeted segment over 12 months, demonstrating my ability to provide business stakeholders with the data they need to drive success.

I’m excited by the opportunity to use my advanced Excel skills, including pivot tables and VLOOKUPs, in working on CRM platform data management and user support at Intuvia Technologies. I know that my strong analytical and problem-solving skills and my commitment to data accuracy align with what it takes to succeed at the Business Support Analyst role.

I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Warm regards,
Justin Miller
